name: Plantation Shrimp with Rice
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup bell pepper (red or green), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter flavored cooking spray in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and bell pepper; sauté until vegetables are just tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in mushrooms and cook until they are soft, about 5 more minutes.
4. Stir in liquid Butter Buds, Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and bay leaves.
5. Add shrimp to the skillet and cook until they turn pink, about 8-10 minutes.
6. Stir in cooked rice; let the mixture sit for a few minutes before serving.
7. Remove bay leaves, then sprinkle with parsley.
If you use red bell pepper, it makes a nice holiday casserole.
Calories: 214
Exchanges: 3 Meat, 1 bread, 1 Veg
Cholesterol: 175 Mg
Sodium: 193 Mg
Dietary Fiber: 1 Gm
